title: Conflict Diagnosis and Semantic Resolution · Repository Checkpoint
summary: Resolve an integration conflict by reconstructing both intents and verifying behavior rather than deleting markers until Git accepts the file. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing.
Read conflict markers and diff views while obtaining surrounding base and commit intent.
Construct a new result from requirements, tests, and both histories rather than treating resolution as text selection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# git-basics cumulative repository evidence notebook
# Git operations change only disposable simulated repository state.
# Inspect status, diffs, graph, refs, and recovery before every mutation.

steps.title: Conflict Stages · changed case
steps.instruction:
quiz case — Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=6, and repair limit=7 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue. Competency probe: Inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing.

Which action demonstrates Conflict Stages without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Conflict Stages evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Conflict Stages assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write the quiz evidence note for Rerere Regression: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=3, and repair limit=4 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue. Competency probe: Record or reuse conflict resolutions only after verifying context, tests, and changed-case behavior.
steps.why: Retrieving Rerere Regression through the concrete a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Record or reuse conflict resolutions only after verifying context, tests, and changed-case behavior.
